description: Eval cases for the caibao finance-video pipeline skill. Each case asserts the skill produces the expected shape / behaviour without manual intervention.

cases.description: TypeScript noEmit type check must pass cleanly with no errors.
cases.notes: Run after every change to src/.

cases.description: 8-case offline smoke test must all pass with the mock provider.
cases.notes: Covers transcript schema, timeline, scorer, planner, direction engine, mock author, end-to-end.

cases.description: Agent entry point must produce a DraftExperience + CoverageReport from the demo transcript with --provider mock.
Loop entry point must process every JSON in the inputs dir and write a _summary.json.
cases.command: mkdir -p /tmp/eval-loop-in /tmp/eval-loop-out && cp examples/demo-transcript.json /tmp/eval-loop-in/a.json && cp examples/demo-transcript.json /tmp/eval-loop-in/b.json && ./bin/run-loop.sh --inputs-dir /tmp/eval-loop-in --outputs-dir /tmp/eval-loop-out --provider mock
cases.notes: Per-file outputs and the summary report must both be produced.

cases.description: Demo output must contain every top-level field the caibao web app exposes over /analysis/jobs/:jobId/draft.
cases.command: node -e "const o=require('./examples/demo-output.json'); const need=['draft','coverageReport','timings']; for(const k of need){if(!(k in o)){console.error('missing '+k);process.exit(1);}} const d=o.draft; for(const k of ['experienceId','title','contentVersion','mediaFingerprint','publishStatus','blockers','evidence','concepts','claims','causalEdges','conditions','triggerCandidates','rejectedTriggerCandidates','approvedTriggers']){if(!(k in d)){console.error('draft missing '+k);process.exit(1);}} for(const c of d.triggerCandidates){if(typeof c.priority!=='number'){console.error('cue missing priority');process.exit(1);}if(!('payload' in c||c.kind==='context_card')){}} console.log('shape OK')"
cases.notes: Guards against accidental field removal. Only runs after demo-end-to-end-mock passes.

cases.description: When ASR is enabled but no creds and no transcript override, the runner must fail with ASR_CREDENTIALS_MISSING — never with a generic INTERNAL_ERROR.
cases.command: npm run --silent demo 2>&1; echo "exit=$?"; unset OPENAI_API_KEY VOLC_ASR_API_KEY VOLC_ASR_APP_ID VOLC_ASR_ACCESS_TOKEN; npx tsx src/agent/run-pipeline.ts --video /nonexistent.mp4 --provider openai 2>&1 | grep -q 'ASR_CREDENTIALS_MISSING\|MEDIA_FILE_NOT_FOUND'
cases.notes: Confirms the runner's error model gives a stable machine-readable code.
